name: web-design-guidelines

metadata:
  author: vercel
  version: "1.0.0"
  argument-hint: <file-or-pattern>

# Web Interface Guidelines

Review files for compliance with Web Interface Guidelines.

## How It Works

1. Fetch the latest guidelines from the source URL below
2. Read the specified files (or prompt user for files/pattern)
3. Check against all rules in the fetched guidelines
4. Output findings in the terse `file:line` format

## Guidelines Source

Fetch fresh guidelines before each review:

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vercel-labs/web-interface-guidelines/main/command.md
```

Use WebFetch to retrieve the latest rules. The fetched content contains all the rules and output format instructions.

## Usage

When a user provides a file or pattern argument:
1. Fetch guidelines from the source URL above
2. Read the specified files
3. Apply all rules from the fetched guidelines
4. Output findings using the format specified in the guidelines

If no files specified, ask the user which files to review.
```

     1	# @haklex/rich-style-token
     2	
     3	设计令牌和 CSS 变量，基于 Vanilla Extract 实现零运行时样式。
     4	
     5	## 安装
     6	
     7	```bash
     8	pnpm add @haklex/rich-style-token
     9	```
    10	
    11	## 使用
    12	
    13	```tsx
    14	import { vars } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
    15	import { style } from '@vanilla-extract/css'
    16	
    17	export const container = style({
    18	  color: vars.color.text,
    19	  padding: vars.spacing.md,
    20	  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.md,
    21	})
    22	```
    23	
    24	## 运行时颜色覆写
    25	
    26	主题契约生成标准 CSS 自定义属性（`--rc-*`），使用方可在运行时覆写。
    27	
    28	### 方式一：`createThemeStyle`（类型安全）
    29	
    30	```tsx
    31	import { createThemeStyle } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
    32	
    33	const style = createThemeStyle({
    34	  color: {
    35	    accent: '#0ea5e9',
    36	    text: '#0c4a6e',
    37	    bg: '#f0f9ff',
    38	  },
    39	})
    40	
    41	// CSS 变量向下级联，所有子组件自动生效
    42	<div style={style}>
    43	  <RichEditor />
    44	</div>
    45	```
    46	
    47	`ThemeTokens` 类型自动从 `vars` 契约推导，支持 `color`、`spacing`、`typography`、`borderRadius` 四组的任意子集覆写。
    48	
    49	### 方式二：纯 CSS
    50	
    51	```css
    52	.my-theme {
    53	  --rc-accent: #0ea5e9;
    54	  --rc-text: #0c4a6e;
    55	  --rc-bg: #f0f9ff;
    56	}
    57	```
    58	
    59	### 可覆写的 CSS 变量
    60	
    61	| 分组 | 变量 |
    62	|------|------|
    63	| **Color** | `--rc-text`, `--rc-text-secondary`, `--rc-bg`, `--rc-bg-secondary`, `--rc-border`, `--rc-accent`, `--rc-accent-light`, `--rc-link`, `--rc-code-text`, `--rc-code-bg`, `--rc-quote-border`, `--rc-quote-bg`, `--rc-alert-info`, `--rc-alert-warning`, `--rc-alert-tip`, `--rc-alert-caution`, `--rc-alert-important` |
    64	| **Spacing** | `--rc-space-xs`, `--rc-space-sm`, `--rc-space-md`, `--rc-space-lg`, `--rc-space-xl` |
    65	| **Typography** | `--rc-font-family`, `--rc-font-mono`, `--rc-font-size-base`, `--rc-font-size-small`, `--rc-line-height`, `--rc-line-height-tight` |
    66	| **Border Radius** | `--rc-radius-sm`, `--rc-radius-md`, `--rc-radius-lg` |
    67	
    68	## 导出
    69	
    70	```ts
    71	// CSS 变量契约
    72	export { vars } from './vars.css'
    73	
    74	// 运行时覆写工具
    75	export { createThemeStyle } from './create-theme-style'
    76	export type { ThemeTokens } from './create-theme-style'
    77	
    78	// 主题配置
    79	export { articleLayout, commentLayout, noteLayout } from './themes'
    80	export { serifFonts, sharedFonts } from './themes'
    81	export { darkColors, lightArticleColors, lightCommentColors } from './themes'
    82	
    83	// Portal 主题
    84	export { PortalThemeProvider, PortalThemeWrapper, usePortalTheme } from './portal-theme'
    85	```
    86	
    87	## 变量结构
    88	
    89	### vars.color
    90	
    91	```ts
    92	vars.color.text          // 主文本色
    93	vars.color.textSecondary // 次要文本
    94	vars.color.bg            // 背景色
    95	vars.color.bgSecondary   // 次要背景
    96	vars.color.border        // 边框色
    97	vars.color.accent        // 强调色
    98	vars.color.accentLight   // 浅强调色
    99	vars.color.link          // 链接色
   100	vars.color.codeText      // 代码文本
   101	vars.color.codeBg        // 代码背景
   102	vars.color.quoteBorder   // 引用边框
   103	vars.color.quoteBg       // 引用背景
   104	vars.color.alertInfo     // 提示色
   105	vars.color.alertWarning  // 警告色
   106	vars.color.alertTip      // 建议色
   107	vars.color.alertCaution  // 注意色
   108	vars.color.alertImportant // 重要色
   109	```
   110	
   111	### vars.spacing
   112	
   113	```ts
   114	vars.spacing.xs  // article: 4px, comment: 2px
   115	vars.spacing.sm  // article: 8px, comment: 4px
   116	vars.spacing.md  // article: 16px, comment: 10px
   117	vars.spacing.lg  // article: 24px, comment: 16px

   127	vars.typography.fontSizeSmall  // 小字号

   129	vars.typography.lineHeightTight // 紧行高
   130	```
   131

   136	vars.borderRadius.md  // article: 8px, comment: 6px
   137	vars.borderRadius.lg  // article: 12px, comment: 8px
   138	```

     1	# CLAUDE.md
     2	
     3	This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4	
     5	## Overview
     6	
     7	Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem. Modular packages: core editor, UI primitives, content renderers, plugins, and integration bundles.
     8	
     9	**Build**: Vite 6 + Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS. ESM only (`.mjs`). TypeScript 5.9.
    10	
    11	## Terminology: Static / Edit Split
    12	
    13	The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.
    14	
    15	### Four Concepts
    16	
    17	| Term | Layer | Purpose | Example |
    18	|------|-------|---------|---------|
    19	| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
    20	| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
    21	| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
    22	| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |
    23	
    24	### Bundle Optimization Strategy
    25	
    26	```
    27	RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
    28	├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config.ts)
    29	├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
    30	│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
    31	└── Zero edit UI deps                     └── Full edit UI deps
    32	```
    33	
    34	**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.
    35	
    36	**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.
    37	
    38	### Registration
    39	
    40	| Config file | Contains | Used by |
    41	|-------------|----------|---------|
    42	| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (static) | `RichRenderer` |
    43	| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit) | `RichEditor` |
    44	| `@haklex/rich-renderers` `config.ts` | `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers) | `ShiroRenderer` |
    45	| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |
    46	
    47	## Package Dependency Graph
    48	
    49	```
    50	@haklex/rich-kit-shiro (integration bundle for web app)
    51	├── @haklex/rich-editor (core: editor + renderer + nodes + plugins + styles)
    52	│   └── @haklex/rich-editor-ui (headless Dialog, Dropdown, Popover via @base-ui/react)
    53	├── @haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu (typeahead slash commands)
    54	├── @haklex/rich-renderers (static-only aggregator)
    55	│   └── @haklex/rich-renderer-{codeblock,mermaid,image,video,gallery,alert,linkcard,...}
    56	├── @haklex/rich-renderers-edit (edit-only aggregator, depends on rich-renderers)
    57	│   └── edit renderers + edit nodes + slash-menu + TldrawPlugin + EmbedPlugin
    58	└── @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw (whiteboard extension)
    59	
    60	@haklex/rich-diff (standalone diff viewer, depends on core)
    61	@haklex/rich-editor-demo (dev playground, depends on all)
    62	```
    63	
    64	## Commands
    65	
    66	```bash
    67	# Build
    68	pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build            # BUILD_LIB=1 vite build
    69	pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
    70	pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers build
    71	pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers-edit build     # depends on rich-renderers
    72	
    73	# Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
    74	pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
    75	
    76	# Watch mode for core iteration
    77	pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor dev:build
    78	```
    79	
    80	## Core: @haklex/rich-editor
    81	
    82	Three entry points: `./` (all), `./editor` (RichEditor), `./renderer` (RichRenderer).
    83	
    84	### Directory Layout
    85	
    86	- `src/nodes/` — 18 custom `DecoratorNode` types (Image, CodeBlock, KaTeX, Mermaid, Tldraw, Alert, Gallery, LinkCard, Component, Ta
... (truncated)

     1	type IconNode = [string, Record<string, string>][]
     2	
     3	const SVG_NS = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'
     4	
     5	const DEFAULT_ATTRS: Record<string, string> = {
     6	  xmlns: SVG_NS,
     7	  width: '24',
     8	  height: '24',
     9	  viewBox: '0 0 24 24',
    10	  fill: 'none',
    11	  stroke: 'currentColor',
    12	  'stroke-width': '2',
    13	  'stroke-linecap': 'round',
    14	  'stroke-linejoin': 'round',
    15	}
    16	
    17	export function createLucideSvg(
    18	  iconNode: IconNode,
    19	  attrs: Record<string, string> = {},
    20	): SVGSVGElement {
    21	  const svg = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'svg')
    22	  const merged = { ...DEFAULT_ATTRS, ...attrs }
    23	  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(merged)) {
    24	    svg.setAttribute(k, v)
    25	  }
    26	  for (const [tag, elAttrs] of iconNode) {
    27	    const el = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, tag)
    28	    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(elAttrs)) {
    29	      if (k === 'key') continue
    30	      el.setAttribute(k, v)
    31	    }
    32	    svg.append(el)
    33	  }
    34	  return svg
    35	}
```

     5	import type { RichEditorVariant } from '../types'
     6	
     7	export function clsx(
     8	  ...args: Array<string | undefined | null | false>
     9	): string {

    13	export function getVariantClass(

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-23 10:02:23Z)**_

**Findings (ordered by severity)**

1. **[High] Note variant top-level paragraph selectors miss renderer DOM, so note-specific typography regresses in read-only mode.**  
   `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/note.css.ts:19` and `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/note.css.ts:20` only target direct children of `noteBase` and `.rich-editor__content`. But renderer output uses `.rich-content__body` (`packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx:54`), so rules for indent/drop-cap/first-paragraph spacing at `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/note.css.ts:22`, `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/note.css.ts:37`, `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/note.css.ts:45` won’t apply there.

2. **[Medium] Details summary text can overflow/push the chevron due removed flex overflow guards.**  
   `.rich-details-summary-text` is now only `flex: '1'` (`packages/rich-editor/src/styles/details.css.ts:43`), while the summary is a flex row (`packages/rich-editor/src/styles/details.css.ts:14`). Removing `min-width: 0` + truncation behavior risks long/unbroken summary text overflowing and affecting layout.

3. **[Medium] Article max width is no longer token-driven, reducing theme override correctness.**  
   `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/article.css.ts:14` hardcodes `maxWidth: '65ch'` instead of `vars.layout.maxWidth`. That bypasses the exported layout token contract (`packages/rich-style-token/src/vars.css.ts:44`) and can regress custom themes that override max width.

4. **[Low] Hover transition targets the wrong property in details summary.**  
   Transition is set to `color` (`packages/rich-editor/src/styles/details.css.ts:27`) but hover changes `opacity` (`packages/rich-editor/src/styles/details.css.ts:30`), so the effect won’t animate as configured.

**Open questions / assumptions**

1. If losing note-style paragraph treatment in renderer is intentional, the selector change is fine; otherwise it should include `.rich-content__body` as a top-level container target.
2. If hardcoding article width is intentional product direction, the token contract docs should explicitly note that `layout.maxWidth` no longer affects article variant.

**Testing gap**

1. No visual/regression test evidence in this diff for note renderer paragraph behavior or long details-summary overflow cases.
